title: consolida regalis subsp. paniculata
intro: Consolida regalis subsp. paniculata, also known as larkspur, is a perennial plant in the borage family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Consolida regalis subsp. paniculata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Consolida regalis subsp. paniculata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
